title: Warium Additions
description: An addon for warium with many addditions and other mods integrations
body:
![alt text](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1363/87/warium_additions_title-png.png)

Warium Additions is an addon for [Warium](https://modrinth.com/mod/warium) mod that adds various additions and integrations with other popular mods

[![Curseforge Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/curseforge-orange?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=CC6600&labelColor=000000)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/warium-additions) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/CrazyWoddMan/Warium-Additions) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.com/channels/1231070281712533504/1430588290930577548) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/MIT-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=coursera&labelColor=000000&color=CC0000)](https://opensource.org/license/mit)
## IMPORTANT
**1.** Starting from 1.1.0 ponder scenes and JEI integration are separated back to **[Warium Ponder & JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/warium_ponder_jei)**

**2.** Mod is required **both on client and server**
# Features
***
## Warium
- **Fluid integration**: Warium fuel tanks can hold any liquids and interact with pipes from other mods like Create and Immersive Engineering. Fuel from other mods can be accepted by Warium engines
- **Forge Energy**: Warium custom energy system is replaced with Forge Energy for better compability with other mods
- **Recipes**: tags are used for ingredients in Warium recipes, which lets use similar ingredients from other mods
- **Creative Mode for Blocks**: Different functional blocks now have `creative` blockstate property. Here's a full list of such blocks and what enabling this features makes them do:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Fuel Tank Input**: stored fuel is not consumed
- **Machine Guns**: ammo is not required to shoot
- **Cannons, Countermeasure and Smoke Launchers**: ammo is not consumed _(still need to be loaded)_
- **Engines**: fuel is not required for engines to run
- **Missile Hardpoint**: missiles are not consumed
</details>


## [Valkyrien Warium](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-warium)
- **Throttle rework**: added config values for min and max throttle values. Engines can be configured by vehicular wrench to only turn on from negative/positive throttle
- **Water Propeller**: rotation direction can be changed by applying redstone signal. If propeller linked to Vehicle Control Node, rotation will be reversed when throttle is negative.
## [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) Integration
- **Rotation Converter**: converts Create rotation to Warium kinetic power in 2:1 ratio, requires 40 stress units per kinetic power level _(both ratios are configurable)_. Can be linked to Vehicle Control Node to control speed with throttle. Applied redstone signal lowers the speed
- **Kinetic Converter**: converts Warium kinetic power to Create rotation and stress capacity. Ratios are the same as for Rotation Converter. Rotation direction can be set by right-click-holding corresponding icon on the side of the block. If `throttleToRotationDirection` config option is set to `true`, rotation direction will be reversed for negative throttle
- **Heat**: all fireboxes emit Create heat similar to Blaze Burner _(heat level for each firebox type is configurable)_. Meanwhile, Blaze burner can heat-up Warium furnaces
- **Engineer's Goggles**: all kinds of Warium block have useful Engineer's Goggles tooltip.
- Deployers placing rockets, missiles, bombs and torpedo parts correctly
- Steel and aluminum blocks can be colored with dye by Deployer. If [ColoredWater](https://modrinth.com/mod/coloredwater) mod is installed, coloring mixing recipes are also available
- [Create: The Factory Must Grow](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-tfmg), [Create: Diesel Generators](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-diesel-generators) engines and [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition) Electric Motor can be linked to Vehicle Control Node for throttle control
## [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) Integration
- Soap cleaning recipe for steel and aluminum blocks are patched
## [Immersive Engineering](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering) Integration
- Warium and Immersive Engineering tools cross-compatibility
- Warium Energy Battery can be configured for input and output sides with the hammer
- Pegmatite added as a mineral source for Ore Excavator _(contains lithium and beryllium)_
- Steel and brass ingots can be made in Blast Furnace from Immersive Engineering
***

- **[bostmannov](https://modrinth.com/user/bostmannov)** for sponsoring this project
- **[MelodicCougar7](https://modrinth.com/user/melodiccougar7)** and **[Reglei](https://modrinth.com/user/Reglei)** for the Create recipes integration
